executives.name: Catharine Farrow
executives.background: Dr. Catharine Farrow is a professional geoscientist with over 25 years of experience in the mining industry. She was previously the CEO of TMAC Resources Inc.

executives.name: Grant Murdoch
executives.background: Grant Murdoch was appointed as a Non-Executive Director on 30 October 2017. He is a Chartered Accountant and was previously a partner of Ernst & Young and Deloitte.
